overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link traversing a snowy mountain environment at night. The character moves from a narrow rocky canyon into an open landscape featuring ancient stone ruins and encounters wildlife, with light snowfall and a starry green-tinted sky throughout.

agents.ego_description: Link walking steadily through the narrow snow-covered canyon, navigating between tall rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the narrow canyon passage
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the narrow canyon passage
snow-covered rocky path that Link is traversing
dark night sky with visible stars and greenish atmospheric glow visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: Link moves through a narrow, enclosed mountain canyon with snow-covered ground and rocky walls on both sides. The night sky is mostly blocked by the canyon walls, with only a small patch of starry sky visible ahead. The environment is quiet and empty except for the light snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with ancient ruins

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wide open mountain landscape with full sky visibility
ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance as the fog clears slightly

agents.ego_description: Link walking across the open hillside toward the distant ancient ruins, moving from rocky terrain to snow-covered grassland

entered.detail: pair of tall weathered stone pillars rising from the distant landscape
rolling snow-covered mountain slopes extending to the horizon
rolling snow-covered mountain slopes with scattered boulders
white-barked trees with snow-covered branches scattered across the hillside

segments.scene_description: Link emerges from the canyon into a wide-open mountain landscape under a starry night sky. Two massive ancient stone pillars become visible in the distance as the character traverses snow-covered hills dotted with sparse birch trees. The atmosphere remains cool and hazy with light snowfall continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with wildlife and ancient ruins

events.description: large moose appears standing on the left hillside among the rocks

agents.ego_description: Link continuing through the deep snow toward the ancient ruins, passing by a moose standing on the left hillside

notable_agents.action: large moose standing on snow-covered ridge, facing left and remaining stationary

entered.detail: large dark-colored moose with antlers standing on the snowy hillside
evergreen trees covered in snow on the distant left slope

segments.scene_description: Link traverses a wide snowy valley with the ancient ruins now closer and more prominent. A large moose stands on the left hillside, adding wildlife to the serene winter scene. The snow-covered ground becomes deeper as the character approaches the towering stone pillars, with snow-capped trees lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Link travels from a claustrophobic mountain canyon into a vast, open winter wilderness. It begins within a narrow rocky corridor where snow-covered ground is flanked by high walls that obscure most of the starry night sky. As the character moves forward, the canyon walls recede and the environment expands into a wide mountain landscape featuring sparse birch trees and two massive ancient stone pillars looming in the distance. The scene then shifts into a deep snowy valley where the ruins become more prominent and a large moose appears on a nearby hillside. Finally, the camera glides through deeper snow and past snow-capped trees as Link approaches the towering stone pillars under a hazy, starlit sky.
